nasb.text: “Son of man, set your face toward Gog of the land of Magog, the prince of Rosh, Meshech and Tubal, and prophesy against him

esv.text: “Son of man, set your face toward Gog, of the land of Magog, the chief prince of Meshech and Tubal, and prophesy against him

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要面向瑪各地的歌革，就是羅施、米設和土巴的首領，說預言攻擊他，

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要面向玛各地区的歌革，就是米设和土巴的首领，说预言斥责他，
